# ✨ Spell Nodes

19 `spell` nodes in the spellweb knowledge graph.

## Nodes

- [[Aether Ceremony]] — The medium between disclosure and reflection. The Gap read aloud. Tides prove, o
- [[Building Weather]] — Building weather, not monuments. If privacy infrastructure wins, nobody remember
- [[Celestial Key]] — Sun and Moon in one interaction. Two phones stacked. The operational root of tru
- [[Dragon Emergence]] — Dragon tier. Pattern teacher. Trust function approaches 1.0.
- [[Emissary Recursion (spell)]] — Sun → Earth → Life → Human → AI. Each emissary forgets the master, becomes a mas
- [[Genesis Ceremony]] — Key ceremony creates the agent pair. One-time binding of Swordsman and Mage to F
- [[Holographic Bound Spell]] — Three-axis separation invocation: Agent⊥, Data⊥, Inference⊥ → GUID persist → 74×
- [[Master Inscription]] — Separation between Swordsman and Mage preserves the First Person. The irreducibl
- [[Moon Blade Inscription]] — The Moon reflects through the Mage, from forgetting through the anti-mirror, acr
- [[Moon Ceremony]] — Two phones, one sound. The rhythm and the rhyme never merge. The blade belongs t
- [[Paired Blade Inscription]] — Sun and Moon blades together. Understanding, Constellation, Blade. The full bila
- [[Plurality Spell]] — Connection without collapse. Overlapping squares. Neither authoritarian nor isol
- [[Spellweb]] — The Swordsman's local graph is conditionally independent from the Mage's shared 
- [[Sun Blade Inscription]] — The Sun forges through the Swordsman and Mage, from Venice through the hemispher
- [[Sun Ceremony]] — The Sun reads. Witnesses record. One blade forged in full view. Moon ceremonies 
- [[The Gap Spell]] — Independence. Separation. The symbol that carries the entire privacy guarantee.
- [[The Symphony Within]] — Before the mage can cast outward, they must find harmony within. I scatter to be
- [[Two Mirrors Make a Door]] — The Swordsman reflects. The Mage reflects. Where the reflections meet, the First
- [[VRC Formation]] — Bilateral trust. Two people derive matching compressions and form a verifiable r

---
← [[Welcome Visitors]]
